landing.title: Gather | The Delightful Virtual Office for Remote Teams
landing.text:
Gather | The Delightful Virtual Office for Remote Teams
What's new
Product
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
Contact Sales
Login
Get started
Just shipped: Canada Day & 4th of July objects
A virtual workspace that feels refreshingly human
The remote collaboration tool where you can meet, chat, and work together like you’re in person. No scheduling needed for quick interactions.
Create Your Space
Meetings
Chat
Activity
Design Review
Natasha
Cameron
Scott
Melodie
Eva
Joshua
What is a virtual office?
A digital workspace where remote teams can connect and collaborate like they’re in person. See who’s around, join conversations without scheduling, and create a space as unique as your team. Most remote collaboration tools are built for meetings. Gather is built for the moments in between.
Virtual Workspace
Collaborate instantly
Forget scheduling and meeting links. Look around your virtual office to find who’s free and start talking in seconds.
See who's free
Instantly know who’s free, focused, or in meetings
Wave them over
Hear nearby conversations
Join in a click
Start free 30-day trial
Learn more about the virtual office
Available
Minimize distractions
You decide who gets your attention. Control what you see and hear, and show others when you're busy.
Simplify Your View
Switch to Simplified View to focus on people rather than details, and stay connected with Mini Mode even when using different apps.
Control What You Hear
You’re muted by default and hear public conversations only if you choose. You have full control over what you hear and who can hear you.
Set Your Availability
Let your team know when you're free or deep in focus mode. They’ll have the context they need to reach out at the right time.
Remote work, reimagined
What if remote work felt less... remote?
Gather makes remote work feel more natural and delightful
Traditional Collaboration Tools
Another Zoom link
Wait hours for Slack replies
Exhausted from 'camera-on' all the time
Disconnected from your team
Static meeting links
Gather’s Workspace
Walk up and talk — no links required
See who's free
right now
Be present without being on camera
Feel the team's energy at a glance
A workspace that feels alive ✨
Testimonials
Join 5,000+ remote teams who feel like teams
Remote work doesn’t have to feel lonely. Hear from teams who stopped feeling so far away.
"By using Gather, messages on Slack and Google Chat dropped by about 80%. I can't imagine working remotely in a team without it now."
Luke Gregory
CEO at Horaizon
Read Customer Story
"For our remote-first team, Gather brings a space to work and that feeling of belonging. And yes, cuts down the online meeting time dramatically while improving the person-to-person communication :-)"
Szymon Niemczura
CEO at hellobot
"The team absolutely loves Gather. We get to have shorter chats and keep conversations going while closing loops faster. We don't feel the need to set up hour-long meetings to discuss the smallest things and have everyone think: 'This could have been an email!'"
Clara Daray
Co-Founder & Managing Partner at Pegasus
"Gather has helped our team culture in a massive way since we all work remotely, but it feels like we're in one office, one headspace. We're a lot more connected to each other this way, and the amount of meetings has gone down."
Kayla Goosen
Marketing Manager at mutherboard
"As a fully remote team, Gather helps us recreate the spontaneous conversations and cross-pollination of ideas that naturally occur in a physical office."
Luca Lucchese
Head of Product at Tundr
"Introducing Gather's virtual workspace has been a game-changer for how we connect and collaborate day to day. It’s more than a virtual office. It’s where conversations happen naturally, collaboration feels easy, and culture shows up in the small moments."
Natalie Karr
Director of Marketing
View on LinkedIn
"Introducing Gather's virtual workspace has been a game-changer for how we connect and collaborate day to day. It’s more than a virtual office. It’s where conversations happen naturally, collaboration feels easy, and culture shows up in the small moments."
Natalie Karr
Director of Marketing
View on LinkedIn
"Gather allows us to create our office culture and run our company. People can easily see each other and work together. It pulls down the boundaries in the remote work environment."
Hera Akdeniz
Operations Associate at Cathoven
"What surprised me [about Gather] is how much friction disappears when 'being around' becomes visible again. You see who’s there. You get a feel for availability. Quick questions become quick again because you can virtually walk over 🙌🏻"
Felix Göbel
Senior Account Executive at awork
View on LinkedIn
View all testimonials
Get Started
The first 30 days are on us
Try Gather 2.0 free with your team. No credit card. No setup fees.
Create Your Space
2 Minutes
Choose & configure your space
1 Click
Invite your team
Immediately
Start collaborating
View Plans
Get answers
FAQs
What is a virtual office?
A virtual office is an online workspace where remote teams can see each other, talk spontaneously, and collaborate naturally — without constantly scheduling video meetings. Think of it just like a physical office, but virtual…so it's accessible from anywhere and doesn't require a commute.
Who uses Gather?
Remote-first and distributed teams of all sizes, from early-stage startups to creative agencies to established companies, use Gather as their virtual office. Teams use Gather to stay connected, run meetings, onboard new hires, and build the kind of culture that's hard to create on Zoom and Slack.
What's included in the free 30-day trial?
Everything! For the first 30 days, you can invite up to 50 teammates to try every feature Gather offers. That includes meetings and chat, AI meeting notes, the ability to fully customize your office, and more.
View pricing for details
.
How do I get started?
Getting started with Gather is easy, and your first 30 days are on us! It takes less than 10 minutes to set up your workspace. You can choose to invite teammates immediately or spend extra time customizing your virtual office.
For onboarding tips, check out our
pilot guide
.
Moving from Gather 1.0? Follow the
migration guide
.
Can I still use Gather 1.0 (Classic)?
Yes. You can
sign in to Gather 1.0
here.
If you have a 1.0 office space, you can continue using it for the duration of your subscription.
If you have a 1.0 event space, you can continue hosting events as long as you purchase a one-time reservation or subscription.
To create a new 1.0 event space,
click here
.
Still have questions?
Visit Help Center
Make remote work feel less remote
Join 5,000+ remote teams building real team culture on Gather
Start free 30-day trial

What's included in the free 30-day trial?

View pricing for details
.
How is pricing different in Gather 2.0?
Gather 2.0 uses a
member-based model
. You pay for your team, not your guests. It’s simpler and more predictable.
Gather 1.0 charges based on
concurrent users
, which means estimating how many people will be online at the same time in your workspace.
If you have questions about your subscription,
feel free to contact us
.

changelog.title: Gather Updates | Virtual Workspace for Remote Teams
changelog.text:
Gather Updates | Virtual Workspace for Remote Teams
What's new
Product
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
Contact Sales
Login
Get started
What's New
Learn about the latest features and fixes for virtual offices on Gather. For a sneak peek at what's coming next, check out our
roadmap
.
Jun 29, 2026
Canada Day & 4th of July objects
Fire up the festivities with new summer holiday objects! Deck out your office for Canada Day and the 4th of July with patriotic decorations and cookout staples like grills, coolers, and fireworks.
Jun 22, 2026
More community-requested objects
You've given us so many great object ideas that we've created 11 more, including podcast gear, a charcuterie board, a space heater, additional window options, and more!
Jun 17, 2026
Juneteenth objects 💙❤️
Juneteenth is a day to remember, reflect, and celebrate together. Honor the day with your team in Gather with the Juneteenth flag and new cookout objects.
Jun 1, 2026
Pride flags 🏳️‍🌈
New Pride flags are ready to hang around your virtual office! Celebrate Pride Month (or anytime, really!).
May 25, 2026
Industrial objects
Outfit your virtual office with heavy-duty gear, from fabrication machines and rugged pipes to new furniture with metal accents. Whether you're building a factory floor or a scrappy maker space, we've got the hardware.
May 20, 2026
Community-requested objects
We asked what object you were missing in your virtual office, and created 5 of them! A campfire, surfboard, pool table, plate of coxinha, and lava lamp are all available now for every team on Gather.
May 8, 2026
Mark all activity as read
Notifications piling up? Now you can "Mark all as read" in the Activity tab to instantly get back to a clean slate.
May 5, 2026
Throw confetti! 🎉
Celebrate wins with a burst of fun. React with 🎉 or press 'F' to throw confetti!
May 1, 2026
New floor colors & patterns
Every floor pattern is now available in 22 colors. Open Gather Studio to switch up your style and add a little color!
Gather Studio Guide
Apr 1, 2026
Easter objects! 🐇
Hop into spring with new Easter objects! Fill your virtual space with Easter baskets and chocolate bunnies, then set your dinner table with hot cross buns, lamb chops and a vase of lilies.
Load more
Newsletter
Stay in the loop
Get the latest Gather updates straight to your inbox, once a month.
Make remote work feel less remote
Join 5,000+ remote teams building real team culture on Gather
Start free 30-day trial

hits.title: MIT's Deb Roy: Let's gather around the “digital hearth”
Gather – Better spaces to gather around
Show HN: A collaborative creation platform for makers to gather around new ideas
Hackers gather around the globe to fight climate change
Gorillas gather around and groom their dead
Perl 6 small stuff #5: Gather around, it’s time to get lazy (…but why?)
Show HN: APIRank.dev – We crawled and ranked public APIs from the internet
Ask HN: What caused the Olympics to become so terrible?

analysis.name: Around (Gather)
analysis.tagline: A virtual workspace that feels refreshingly human
analysis.value_proposition: A persistent virtual office where remote teams see who's around and collaborate spontaneously without scheduling meetings.
analysis.ideal_customer: Remote-first and distributed teams (startups, agencies, mid-market companies up to ~100 concurrent members) wanting spatial presence and spontaneous collaboration in place of Zoom+Slack

features.name: custom virtual office
features.description: Persistent spatial 2D office where team members are represented as avatars

features.name: unlimited audio video and chat
features.description: Unlimited audio, video, and chat with no meeting caps

features.name: concurrent member cap
features.description: Up to 100 members can be online in a space simultaneously

features.name: permanent chat
features.description: Persistent chat history that stays available beyond a meeting

features.name: meeting chat
features.description: Chat channel scoped to a meeting

features.name: nearby chat
features.description: Proximity-based chat with people near your avatar

features.name: private and public channels
features.description: Both open and private chat channels

features.name: direct messages
features.description: 1:1 and group direct messaging

features.name: threaded replies
features.description: Reply in threads to a specific chat message

differentiators: Persistent spatial 2D office (walk-up presence, not meeting links)
No scheduling needed for spontaneous conversations
Member-based pricing (Gather 2.0) instead of concurrent-user pricing
Playful office culture layer (go karts, confetti, gong, decorations)

free_tier.limits: 30-day free trial for up to 50 teammates with all features; no perpetual free tier

tiers.name: Essential Plan
tiers.headline_inclusions: All features: custom office, unlimited meetings/chat, AI notes, integrations, capped recording/transcription/guests

tiers.name: Custom Plan
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Essential + SSO, custom/larger offices, hybrid solutions, custom onboarding, extended trial

pricing.notes: Member-based pricing in Gather 2.0 (pay per member, not concurrent user). Yearly billing gives 20% off. Some features metered: meeting recording starts at 20 hours, transcriptions and guest hosting start at 30 hours. Gather 1.0 legacy plans priced by concurrent users.
